value.zh: 离线密码哈希审计参考，覆盖格式识别、Hashcat Mode、John the Ripper 和结果复核；只处理批准的 Fixture 或脱敏导出，并记录算法、来源与成本参数。
value.en: An offline password-hash auditing reference covering format identification, Hashcat modes, John the Ripper, and result review, limited to approved fixtures or redacted exports with algorithm, source, and cost parameters recorded.

value.zh: 使用 HashID 或 Hash-Identifier 生成候选格式；短哈希可能对应多种算法，必须结合来源、长度、编码和应用配置确认。
value.en: Use HashID or Hash-Identifier to generate candidate formats, then confirm ambiguous short hashes through source, length, encoding, and application configuration.

value.zh: 离线示例格式查询
value.en: Offline Example-Format Lookup

value.zh: 从本地 Hashcat 示例库检索常见格式与 Mode，不把任何哈希或关联标识提交到第三方在线服务。
value.en: Look up common formats and modes in the local Hashcat example catalog without submitting hashes or associated identifiers to third-party services.

value.zh: 使用 John 对批准的哈希 Fixture 执行字典与规则测试，并用 --show 输出已恢复项；格式不明确时先显式指定 --format。
value.en: Use John for dictionary and rule tests against approved hash fixtures and report recovered entries with --show, specifying --format when detection is ambiguous.

value.zh: Hashcat 是 GPU/CPU 加速的离线密码恢复与强度审计工具，支持字典、Mask、Rule、组合和基准模式；运行前必须确认 Hash Mode、成本参数和资源上限。
value.en: Hashcat is a GPU- and CPU-accelerated offline password-recovery and strength-audit tool supporting dictionary, mask, rule, combination, and benchmark modes after hash-mode, cost, and resource-limit validation.

value.zh: 使用 Mode 0 和批准字典测试 MD5 Fixture，先通过 --show 与示例格式确认输入解析正确，再开始计算。
value.en: Test an approved MD5 fixture with mode 0 and a selected wordlist, confirming input parsing through --show and example hashes before computation.

value.zh: 对六字符 Mask 执行最多 60 秒的有界测试，用于估算搜索空间和吞吐，不作为无期限暴力破解任务。
value.en: Run a six-character mask for at most 60 seconds to estimate search-space throughput rather than starting an unbounded brute-force job.

patches.value: printf '%s\n' '?l lowercase' '?u uppercase' '?d digits' '?s symbols' '?a printable' '?b byte-00-ff'

value.zh: 输出 Hashcat 内置 Mask 字符集速查，构造 Mask 时应按已知密码策略缩小搜索空间并避免不可复现的自定义字符集。
value.en: Print the built-in Hashcat mask-character reference, using known password policy to bound search space and documenting any custom character sets.

value.zh: 对批准字典应用 best64 Rule 生成可解释的候选变换，并保存 Rule 文件版本以便复现结果。
value.en: Apply the best64 rule to an approved wordlist for explainable candidate transformations, preserving the rule-file version for reproduction.

value.zh: 使用组合模式连接两个受控字典的每个候选，运行前计算乘积规模并设置 Runtime 或候选上限。
value.en: Use combination mode to join candidates from two controlled wordlists, calculating the Cartesian size and setting a runtime or candidate cap first.

patches.value: hashcat --example-hashes | rg -n "Hash mode #0 |Hash mode #100 |Hash mode #1000 |Hash mode #3200 |Hash mode #5600 |Hash mode #13100 "

value.zh: 从本地示例库查询常用 Mode 的名称、样例和解析规则，避免仅凭哈希长度选择错误算法。
value.en: Query names, examples, and parsing rules for common modes from the local catalog instead of choosing an algorithm from hash length alone.

value.zh: 使用与任务相同的 Mode 查看 Potfile 中已恢复结果，并核对输入哈希数量、用户名字段和输出分隔符。
value.en: Show recovered potfile entries with the same mode as the job, checking input count, username fields, and output separators.

value.zh: 仅对 Mode 0 运行设备基准，记录 Hashcat 版本、驱动、设备和温度，避免默认遍历全部 Mode。
value.en: Benchmark only mode 0 and record Hashcat version, driver, device, and temperature instead of running the default all-mode benchmark.

value.zh: THC Hydra 是多协议认证强度与锁定策略验证工具，支持 SSH、FTP、HTTP Form、RDP、数据库和任务恢复；应使用合成账号、极小字典和低并发。
value.en: THC Hydra validates authentication strength and lockout policy across SSH, FTP, HTTP forms, RDP, databases, and resumed jobs using synthetic accounts, minimal wordlists, and low concurrency.

value.zh: 使用批准的合成用户名和小型密码清单验证 FTP 认证与锁定策略，并在首次成功或告警阈值到达时停止。
value.en: Validate FTP authentication and lockout policy with approved synthetic users and a small password list, stopping at first success or the alert threshold.

value.zh: 针对登记的登录表单配置字段名和失败响应标记，先用正常与错误凭据校准，再运行受限候选集。
value.en: Configure registered form field names and failure markers, calibrate with valid and invalid credentials, and then run a bounded candidate set.

value.zh: 使用测试管理员账号和小型字典验证 RDP 锁定与审计事件，限制任务数并监控域控和目标日志。
value.en: Validate RDP lockout and audit events with a synthetic administrator and small wordlist while limiting tasks and monitoring controller plus target logs.

value.zh: 对实验 MySQL 服务的合成 root 账号运行小型字典检查，记录服务端拒绝、锁定和连接错误。
value.en: Run a small-wordlist check against the synthetic root identity on a lab MySQL service, recording rejection, lockout, and connection errors.

value.zh: 将并发限制为四个任务，并结合服务容量、告警阈值和账号锁定策略继续下调，而不是以吞吐量为目标。
value.en: Limit concurrency to four tasks and reduce it further based on service capacity, alert thresholds, and account-lockout policy rather than maximizing throughput.

value.zh: 从 Hydra Restore 文件恢复已中断的同一授权任务；恢复前核对目标、账号清单、时间窗口和停止条件仍然有效。
value.en: Resume the same authorized job from a Hydra restore file after confirming target, account inventory, time window, and stop conditions remain valid.

value.zh: John the Ripper 是离线密码哈希与受保护文件口令审计工具，支持字典、Rule、Incremental 和多种 *2john 转换器；仅处理批准 Fixture。
value.en: John the Ripper audits offline password hashes and protected-file passphrases through wordlists, rules, incremental mode, and multiple *2john converters, limited to approved fixtures.

value.zh: 使用批准的小型字典测试 Fixture 哈希文件，并保存 John Session 以便复现和受控恢复。
value.en: Test a fixture hash file with a small approved wordlist and preserve the John session for reproducible, controlled resumption.

value.zh: 显式指定 raw-md5 解析 Fixture，先用 --show=left 核对未恢复项，避免自动识别到错误格式。
value.en: Explicitly parse the fixture as raw-md5 and review unrecovered entries with --show=left so format auto-detection cannot select the wrong parser.

value.zh: 显示当前输入中已由 Potfile 恢复的条目，并核对格式、用户名字段和总数，不重新运行计算任务。
value.en: Display entries already recovered from the current input and potfile, checking format, username fields, and totals without rerunning computation.

patches.value:
unshadow fixtures/passwd fixtures/shadow > artifacts/unshadow-fixture.txt
john --wordlist=fixtures/approved-passwords.txt artifacts/unshadow-fixture.txt

value.zh: 合并实验 passwd 与 shadow Fixture 后运行小型字典检查，不读取本机或生产系统账户文件。
value.en: Combine lab passwd and shadow fixtures and run a small-wordlist check without reading local-machine or production account files.

value.zh: 从受控 ZIP Fixture 提取验证哈希并使用批准字典测试口令，完成后删除 artifacts 中间文件。
value.en: Extract a verifier hash from a controlled ZIP fixture and test it with an approved wordlist, deleting the intermediate artifact afterward.

value.zh: 从受控 RAR Fixture 提取验证哈希并执行有限字典测试，记录归档格式和 John 解析器。
value.en: Extract a verifier hash from a controlled RAR fixture and run a bounded dictionary test, recording archive format and John parser.

value.zh: 从实验加密私钥生成 John 输入并使用批准字典验证口令强度，不处理任何真实运维密钥。
value.en: Generate John input from a lab encrypted private key and validate passphrase strength with an approved wordlist, never using operational keys.

value.zh: 对 Fixture 运行最多 60 秒的 Incremental 模式以评估成本，避免无期限暴力搜索。
value.en: Run incremental mode against a fixture for at most 60 seconds to estimate cost without an unbounded brute-force search.
